# and are intentionally not compiled here. Install them with:
#     pip install -e "services/ekie[huggingface]"
# For NVIDIA GPU acceleration install a CUDA build of torch matching your driver
# INSTEAD of the default CPU wheel, e.g. (CUDA 13):
#     pip install torch==2.12.1 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130
# Then set EKIE_EMBEDDING__DEVICE=auto and EKIE_EMBEDDING__TORCH_DTYPE=float16.
#
